title: Infosys opens new Zurich office to support Swiss enterprise AI and digital transformation clients
detailed_summary: Infosys inaugurated a new office in Zurich, Switzerland, relocating its Swiss headquarters to The Circle at Zurich Airport. The office strengthens Infosys' 25-year presence in Switzerland and is positioned as a hub for innovation, co-creation, and closer client collaboration across sectors including manufacturing, financial services, life sciences, energy & services, telecom, and retail. The office will use Infosys Topaz and Infosys Cobalt to support Swiss enterprises in digitalization, AI-led transformation, cloud adoption, operational resilience, data use, security, and compliance. The document also mentions Infosys' existing Swiss offices and a CSR grant to Little Scientists for STEM education.

key_facts.fact: Infosys inaugurated its new office in Zurich, Switzerland, on January 23, 2026.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Expands Its Footprint in Switzerland with a New Zurich Office to Accelerate Enterprise AI Journeys

key_facts.fact: Relocating the Swiss headquarters to The Circle at Zurich Airport marks a milestone in Infosys' 25-year presence in Switzerland.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Expands Its Footprint in Switzerland with a New Zurich Office to Accelerate Enterprise AI Journeys

key_facts.fact: The Zurich office is intended to serve as a hub for innovation and co-creation and bring Infosys teams closer to clients across manufacturing, financial services, life sciences, energy & services, telecom, and retail sectors, among others.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Expands Its Footprint in Switzerland with a New Zurich Office to Accelerate Enterprise AI Journeys

key_facts.fact: The Zurich office will leverage Infosys Topaz and Infosys Cobalt to support Swiss enterprises in accelerating their digitalization journey.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Expands Its Footprint in Switzerland with a New Zurich Office to Accelerate Enterprise AI Journeys

key_facts.fact: Infosys said the new Zurich office adds to its existing presence in Switzerland, which includes offices in Geneva, Basel, Baden, Lausanne, and Baar.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Expands Its Footprint in Switzerland with a New Zurich Office to Accelerate Enterprise AI Journeys

esg_or_csr_items.item: Infosys awarded a grant to Little Scientists for a one-year partnership to advance STEM education through a multilingual virtual learning environment on Infosys Springboard, aiming to reach 1,000 students in its first year.
esg_or_csr_items.section_heading: Infosys Expands Its Footprint in Switzerland with a New Zurich Office to Accelerate Enterprise AI Journeys

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in nextgeneration  digital  services  and  consulting,  today  inaugurated  its  new  office  in  Zurich,  Switzerland.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Expands Its Footprint in Switzerland with a New Zurich Office to Accelerate Enterprise AI Journeys
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main event: opening of a new Zurich office.

important_text_spans.text: Relocating the Swiss headquarters to The Circle at Zurich Airport marks a major milestone in Infosys' 25-year presence in the country
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Expands Its Footprint in Switzerland with a New Zurich Office to Accelerate Enterprise AI Journeys
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the strategic relevance of the office move within Infosys' Swiss operations.

important_text_spans.text: By  leveraging  Infosys  Topaz,  an  AI-first  offering  powered  by  generative  AI technologies, and Infosys Cobalt, a set of services, solutions and platforms for enterprises to accelerate their cloud journey, the Zurich office will support Swiss enterprises accelerate their digitalization journey.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Expands Its Footprint in Switzerland with a New Zurich Office to Accelerate Enterprise AI Journeys
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the role of Infosys' AI and cloud offerings in the Zurich office strategy.

processing_notes: No financial metrics, deal value, client contract value, or guidance were disclosed. Infosys Topaz and Infosys Cobalt were treated as supporting capabilities for the office expansion, not as distinct product launches.
